en.extract:
The chestnut-backed jewel-babbler (Ptilorrhoa castanonota) is a species of bird in the family Cinclosomatidae. It is endemic to New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''chestnut-backed jewel-babbler''' ('''''Ptilorrhoa castanonota''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Cinclosomatidae]]. It is [[endemism|endemic]] to [[New Guinea]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
